# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
 * Plugin URI: https://example.com/custom-auth
 * Description: A WordPress plugin that handles user registration and login authentication with secure password hashing.
 * Version: 1.0.0
 * Author: Custom Developer
 * License: GPL v2 or later
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Custom_User_Authentication {

    private static $instance = null;
    private $table_name;

    public static function get_instance() {
        if (self::$instance === null) {
            self::$instance = new self();
        }
        return self::$instance;
    }

    private function __construct() {
        global $wpdb;
        $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_auth_users';

        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
        register_deactivation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'deactivate'));

        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));

        // Shortcodes
        add_shortcode('custom_register_form', array($this, 'render_registration_form'));
        add_shortcode('custom_login_form', array($this, 'render_login_form'));
        add_shortcode('custom_user_dashboard', array($this, 'render_user_dashboard'));

        // AJAX handlers
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_custom_auth_register', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_custom_auth_login', array($this, 'handle_login'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_custom_auth_logout', array($this, 'handle_logout'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_custom_auth_change_password', array($this, 'handle_change_password'));

        // Non-AJAX form handlers
        add_action('admin_post_nopriv_custom_auth_register', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('admin_post_nopriv_custom_auth_login', array($this, 'handle_login'));
        add_action('admin_post_custom_auth_logout', array($this, 'handle_logout'));
        add_action('admin_post_custom_auth_change_password', array($this, 'handle_change_password'));

        // Admin menu
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));

        // Session management
        add_action('init', array($this, 'start_session'), 1);
    }

    public function start_session() {
        if (!session_id() && !headers_sent()) {
            session_start();
        }
    }

    public function init() {
        // Initialize any required components
    }

    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_style(
            'custom-auth-styles',
            plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'css/custom-auth.css',
            array(),
            '1.0.0'
        );

        wp_enqueue_script(
            'custom-auth-script',
            plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'js/custom-auth.js',
            array('jquery'),
            '1.0.0',
            true
        );

        wp_localize_script('custom-auth-script', 'customAuth', array(
            'ajaxurl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('custom_auth_nonce'),
        ));
    }

    /**
     * Plugin activation - create custom users table
     */
    public function activate() {
        global $wpdb;
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();

        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$this->table_name} (
            id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            username VARCHAR(60) NOT NULL,
            email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
            password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
            first_name VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '',
            last_name VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '',
            status TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
            auth_token VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
            token_expiry DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
            failed_login_attempts INT DEFAULT 0,
            last_failed_login DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
            account_locked_until DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            last_login DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY username (username),
            UNIQUE KEY email (email)
        ) $charset_collate;";

        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);

        // Create login attempts log table
        $log_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_auth_login_log';
        $sql_log = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$log_table} (
            id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            user_id BIGINT(20) UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
            ip_address VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL,
            login_status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
            attempted_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY user_id (user_id),
            KEY ip_address (ip_address)
        ) $charset_collate;";

        dbDelta($sql_log);

        // Create CSS directory and file
        $css_dir = plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'css';
        if (!file_exists($css_dir)) {
            mkdir($css_dir, 0755, true);
        }
        file_put_contents($css_dir . '/custom-auth.css', $this->get_default_css());

        // Create JS directory and file
        $js_dir = plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'js';
        if (!file_exists($js_dir)) {
            mkdir($js_dir, 0755, true);
        }
        file_put_contents($js_dir . '/custom-auth.js', $this->get_default_js());

        update_option('custom_auth_db_version', '1.0.0');
        update_option('custom_auth_max_login_attempts', 5);
        update_option('custom_auth_lockout_duration', 30); // minutes
        update_option('custom_auth_min_password_length', 8);
    }

    /**
     * Plugin deactivation
     */
    public function deactivate() {
        // Cleanup if needed
    }

    /**
     * Hash a password using WordPress password hashing (bcrypt-based)
     */
    public function hash_password($plain_password) {
        if (!function_exists('wp_hash_password')) {
            require_once(ABSPATH . WPINC . '/pluggable.php');
        }
        return wp_hash_password($plain_password);
    }

    /**
     * Verify a password against a stored hash
     */
    public function verify_password($plain_password, $password_hash) {
        if (!function_exists('wp_check_password')) {
            require_once(ABSPATH . WPINC . '/pluggable.php');
        }
        return wp_check_password($plain_password, $password_hash);
    }

    /**
     * Validate password strength
     */
    public function validate_password_strength($password) {
        $min_length = get_option('custom_auth_min_password_length', 8);
        $errors = array();

        if (strlen($password) < $min_length) {
            $errors[] = sprintf('Password must be at least %d characters long.', $min_length);
        }

        if (!preg_match('/[A-Z]/', $password)) {
            $errors[] = 'Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.';
        }

        if (!preg_match('/[a-z]/', $password)) {
            $errors[] = 'Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.';
        }

        if (!preg_match('/[0-9]/', $password)) {
            $errors[] = 'Password must contain at least one number.';
        }

        if (!preg_match('/[^A-Za-z0-9]/', $password)) {
            $errors[] = 'Password must contain at least one special character.';
        }

        return $errors;
    }

    /**
     * Validate email format
     */
    public function validate_email($email) {
        return filter_var($email, FILTER_VALIDATE_EMAIL) !== false;
    }

    /**
     * Validate username
     */
    public function validate_username($username) {
        $errors = array();

        if (strlen($username) < 3) {
            $errors[] = 'Username must be at least 3 characters long.';
        }

        if (strlen($username) > 60) {
            $errors[] = 'Username must not exceed 60 characters.';
        }

        if (!preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]+$/', $username)) {
            $errors[] = 'Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens, and dots.';
        }

        return $errors;
    }

    /**
     * Check if username exists
     */
    public function username_exists($username) {
        global $wpdb;
        $count = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s",
            $username
        ));
        return $count > 0;
    }

    /**
     * Check if email exists
     */
    public function email_exists($email) {
        global $wpdb;
        $count = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE email = %s",
            $email
        ));
        return $count > 0;
    }

    /**
     * Get user by username or email
     */
    public function get_user_by($field, $value) {
        global $wpdb;

        $allowed_fields = array('id', 'username', 'email', 'auth_token');
        if (!in_array($field, $allowed_fields)) {
            return null;
        }

        return $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE {$field} = %s",
            $value
        ));
    }

    /**
     * Check if account is locked
     */
    public function is_account_locked($user) {
        if (!empty($user->account_locked_until)) {
            $locked_until = strtotime($user->account_locked_until);
            if ($locked_until > time()) {
                return true;
            } else {
                // Lock period has expired, reset
                global $wpdb;
                $wpdb->update(
                    $this->table_name,
                    array(
                        'failed_login_attempts' => 0,
                        'account_locked_until' => null,
                    ),
                    array('id' => $user->id),
                    array('%d', '%s'),
                    array('%d')
                );
                return false;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    /**
     * Record failed login attempt
     */
    public function record_failed_login($user_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        $max_attempts = get_option('custom_auth_max_login_attempts', 5);
        $lockout_duration = get_option('custom_auth_lockout_duration', 30);

        $user = $this->get_user_by('id', $user_id);
        $new_attempts = ($user->failed_login_attempts ?? 0) + 1;

        $update_data = array(
            'failed_login_attempts' => $new_attempts,
            'last_failed_login' => current_time('mysql'),
        );

        if ($new_attempts >= $max_attempts) {
            $update_data['account_locked_until'] = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', time() + ($lockout_duration * 60));
        }

        $wpdb->update(
            $this->table_name,
            $update_data,
            array('id' => $user_id)
        );

        // Log the attempt
        $log_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_auth_login_log';
        $wpdb->insert($log_table, array(
            'user_id' => $user_id,
            'ip_address' => $this->get_client_ip(),
            'login_status' => 'failed',
        ));
    }

    /**
     * Record successful login
     */
    public function record_successful_login($user_id) {
        global $wpdb;

        $wpdb->update(
            $this->table_name,
            array(
                'failed_login_attempts' => 0,
                'account_locked_until' => null,
                'last_login' => current_time('mysql'),
            ),
            array('id' => $user_id)
        );

        // Log the attempt
        $log_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_auth_login_log';
        $wpdb->insert($log_table, array(
            'user_id' => $user_id,
            'ip_address' => $this->get_client_ip(),
            'login_status' => 'success',
        ));
    }

    /**
     * Generate authentication token
     */
    public function generate_auth_token() {
        return bin2hex(random_bytes(32));
    }

    /**
     * Get client IP address
     */
    public function get_client_ip() {
        $ip_keys = array(
            'HTTP_CLIENT_IP',
            'HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR',
            'HTTP_X_FORWARDED',
            'HTTP_X_CLUSTER_CLIENT_IP',
            'HTTP_FORWARDED_FOR',
            'HTTP_FORWARDED',
            'REMOTE_ADDR'
        );

        foreach ($ip_keys as $key) {
            if (!empty($_SERVER[$key])) {
                $ip = explode(',', $_SERVER[$key]);
                $ip = trim($ip[0]);
                if (filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP)) {
                    return $ip;
                }
            }
        }

        return '0.0.0.0';
    }

    /**
     * Handle user registration
     */
    public function handle_registration() {
        // Verify nonce
        if (!isset($_POST['custom_auth_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST['custom_auth_nonce'], 'custom_auth_register_action')) {
            $this->send_response(false, 'Security verification failed. Please try again.');
            return;
        }

        $username = isset($_POST['username']) ? sanitize_user(trim($_POST['username'])) : '';
        $email = isset($_POST['email']) ? sanitize_email(trim($_POST['email'])) : '';
        $password = isset($_POST['password']) ? $_POST['password'] : '';
        $confirm_password = isset($_POST['confirm_password']) ? $_POST['confirm_password'] : '';
        $first_name = isset($_POST['first_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(trim($_POST['first_name'])) : '';
        $last_name = isset($_POST['last_name']) ? sanitize_text_field(trim($_POST['last_name'])) : '';

        $errors = array();

        // Validate username
        $username_errors = $this->validate_username($username);
        if (!empty($username_errors)) {
            $errors = array_merge($errors, $username_errors);
        }

        // Check if username exists
        if (empty($username_errors) && $this->username_exists($username)) {
            $errors[] = 'This username is already taken.';
        }

        // Validate email
        if (empty($email
